checklist_items.title: Verify forum account linking to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify Rate Limiting on API Endpoints
checklist_items.description: Check if API endpoints handling user authentication have rate limiting implemented to mitigate brute-force attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is susceptible to brute-force attacks against authentication endpoints.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting to control the number of authentication attempts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of rate-limiting configuration and logs showing rate-limiting in action.

checklist_items.title: Review Input Sanitization for User Authentication
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user inputs related to authentication are sanitized to prevent injection attacks (e.g., SQL injection, XSS).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is susceptible to injection attacks through user authentication inputs.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input sanitization and validation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing input sanitization and validation mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Implement Secure Session Management
checklist_items.description: Ensure that secure session management is implemented, including HTTPS, secure cookies, and session timeouts, to protect against session hijacking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is vulnerable to session hijacking attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure session management practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation and code review of session management implementation.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong authentication for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Check that the Governance Forum requires strong authentication (e.g., multi-factor authentication, or linking to an on-chain identity) before allowing users to submit RFRVs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of authentication flows and audit logs showing successful logins with strong authentication.

checklist_items.title: Sanitize all RFRV inputs
checklist_items.description: Verify that all inputs from RFRV submission forms are sanitized to prevent injection attacks (e.g., SQL injection, cross-site scripting).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum is vulnerable to injection attacks due to lack of input sanitization.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Sanitize all user inputs before processing them.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating input sanitization and penetration testing results showing no vulnerabilities.

checklist_items.title: Verify Secure Storage of API Keys
checklist_items.description: Check that API keys for third-party integrations are stored securely using a secrets management system and are not hardcoded in the application.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Sensitive API keys are stored insecurely, increasing the risk of unauthorized access.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Employ a secrets management system to store and rotate API keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of the secrets management solution and its usage for API keys.

checklist_items.title: Implement Input Validation for User-Provided Data
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user-provided data, such as usernames and passwords, undergoes robust input validation to prevent injection attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User-provided data is not properly sanitized before being processed by the application.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation rules to sanitize and validate user-provided data.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating proper input validation techniques.

checklist_items.title: Regular Security Audits and Penetration Testing
checklist_items.description: Conduct regular security audits and penetration testing to proactively identify and address potential vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is vulnerable to attacks due to unknown security weaknesses.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a robust security auditing and penetration testing program.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Reports of regular security assessments and remediation efforts.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure storage of API keys
checklist_items.description: Check that all API keys used by the application are stored securely, using a secrets management system and adhering to least privilege principles.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: API keys are not stored securely, leading to potential data breaches.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a robust secrets management system and least privilege access controls.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation and audit logs demonstrating secure storage and access controls for API keys.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for all user inputs
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user inputs are validated to prevent injection attacks (SQLi, XSS, etc.).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User inputs are not validated, making the application vulnerable to injection attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation mechanisms for all user inputs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and testing results demonstrating effective input validation.

checklist_items.title: Regular security audits and penetration testing
checklist_items.description: Conduct regular security audits and penetration testing to identify and address vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Security vulnerabilities may exist that could be exploited by attackers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regularly perform security audits and penetration testing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Reports from security audits and penetration testing, showing identified and remediated vulnerabilities.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure storage of API keys
checklist_items.description: Check if API keys are stored securely using a secrets management system, such as AWS Secrets Manager or HashiCorp Vault. Ensure that API keys are rotated regularly and never hardcoded in application code.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: API keys are not stored securely, which can lead to unauthorized access and data breaches.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a secrets management system and regularly rotate API keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation showing the implementation of the secrets management system and rotation schedule for API keys.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for all user inputs
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user inputs are validated to prevent injection attacks, such as SQL injection, cross-site scripting (XSS), and command injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User inputs are not properly sanitized and validated, resulting in injection vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation mechanisms to prevent injection attacks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating the use of appropriate input validation techniques in all components handling user input.

checklist_items.title: Regularly review and update security configurations
checklist_items.description: Ensure regular review and updates of the security configurations of all components and assets to address newly discovered vulnerabilities and security best practices.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Security configurations are not kept up-to-date, increasing vulnerability to exploits.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish a regular review and update schedule for security configurations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of the established review and update process, including dates and outcomes of reviews.

checklist_items.title: Verify Secure Cookie Handling
checklist_items.description: Check if all cookies used by the application are set with appropriate security attributes (e.g., HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite) to prevent unauthorized access.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Session cookies are not properly secured, leading to potential unauthorized access.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure cookie handling practices to mitigate risks associated with session hijacking and cross-site scripting attacks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of application code and security headers analysis.

checklist_items.title: Implement Robust Input Validation
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user inputs are validated to prevent injection attacks (e.g., SQL injection, cross-site scripting).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User inputs are not properly validated, making the application vulnerable to injection attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation mechanisms to prevent injection attacks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of application code and security testing results.

checklist_items.title: Regular Security Audits
checklist_items.description: Conduct periodic security audits and penetration testing to identify and address vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Security vulnerabilities may exist within the application and infrastructure that are not being detected.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regularly assess security posture through audits and penetration testing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Reports from security audits and penetration testing.

checklist_items.title: Verify forum account linking to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify Secure Cookie Handling
checklist_items.description: Check if the application uses secure cookies (HTTPS only) and the HttpOnly flag to mitigate the risk of session hijacking.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Session cookies are vulnerable to theft if not properly secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure cookie handling practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of application code and configuration settings for cookie handling.

checklist_items.title: Implement Input Validation for User-Provided Data
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user-supplied data (e.g., forum posts, RFRVs) is properly validated and sanitized before being processed by the application to prevent XSS attacks and other injection vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User inputs are not validated, leading to potential injection attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation and sanitization.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of application code for input validation mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Regular Security Audits and Penetration Testing
checklist_items.description: Conduct regular security audits and penetration tests to identify and address vulnerabilities in the system.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Regular security assessments are not performed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular penetration testing and audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Reports from security audits and penetration tests.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure storage of API keys
checklist_items.description: Check if API keys are stored securely using environment variables or a secrets management system.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: API keys might be exposed in the codebase or configuration files if not managed securely.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Store API keys securely using environment variables or a secrets management system.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review codebase and configuration files for proper API key management; screenshot of secrets management system.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for user-provided data
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user-provided data (e.g., file uploads, form inputs) is validated to prevent injection attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User-provided data could be manipulated to perform unauthorized actions if not properly validated.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input validation to sanitize and filter user-provided data.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review codebase for input validation implementation; provide code examples of input validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong authentication for RFRV submitters
checklist_items.description: Check that the Governance Forum requires wallet-based login with a second factor for all users submitting RFRVs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of login page showing two-factor authentication requirement and wallet login, and audit log showing successful wallet-based logins.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for RFRVs
checklist_items.description: Validate all fields in the RFRV submission form to prevent injection attacks and ensure data integrity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission process is vulnerable to injection attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation on all RFRV fields, including length restrictions, character set validation, and sanitization.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing input validation implementation and test cases demonstrating successful prevention of injection attacks.

checklist_items.title: Verify RFRV submission requires wallet-based login
checklist_items.description: Check that the Governance Forum requires wallet-based login for users submitting RFRVs, ensuring only authenticated users can submit proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot of login process showing wallet-based authentication requirement.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for RFRV parameters
checklist_items.description: Validate all parameters of RFRV submissions to prevent injection attacks and ensure data integrity.  Check for length restrictions, character type validation, and format validation on all user inputs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Malicious actors could submit RFRVs with manipulated parameters, leading to unintended or malicious actions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation to sanitize and verify all RFRV parameters before processing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating input validation measures in the RFRV submission handler, including unit tests.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure storage of API keys
checklist_items.description: Check if API keys are stored securely, ideally in a secrets management system, and not directly in the codebase.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: API keys are stored insecurely, increasing the risk of unauthorized access.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use a secrets management system and avoid hardcoding API keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation or audit report confirming secure storage of API keys and their rotation policy.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for user-supplied data
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user inputs are validated to prevent injection attacks (e.g., SQL injection, cross-site scripting).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User-supplied data is not properly sanitized, making the system vulnerable to injection attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation and sanitization techniques.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and penetration testing report confirming the effectiveness of input validation.

checklist_items.title: Regularly update and patch software components
checklist_items.description: Verify that all software components are updated with the latest security patches to address known vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Outdated software with known vulnerabilities increases the risk of exploitation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish a regular patching schedule and implement automated update mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Patching history log and vulnerability scanning results.

checklist_items.title: Verify input sanitization for user-supplied data
checklist_items.description: Check if all user-supplied data is sanitized to prevent XSS attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User-supplied data may contain malicious code.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation and sanitization mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating input validation and sanitization.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure coding practices
checklist_items.description: Check if the codebase adheres to secure coding guidelines to prevent buffer overflows.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The application may be vulnerable to buffer overflows due to insecure coding practices.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Follow secure coding guidelines to prevent buffer overflows.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Secure coding guidelines and code review

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting to prevent denial-of-service attacks
checklist_items.description: Verify the presence and effectiveness of rate limiting mechanisms to prevent DoS attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The application is vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and traffic shaping.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation and configuration of rate limiting mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Verify Rate Limiting Implementation
checklist_items.description: Check that rate limiting mechanisms are in place to prevent excessive requests from a single IP address or user account.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks due to insufficient rate limiting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust rate limiting measures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of the system's rate-limiting configurations and logs demonstrating effectiveness.

checklist_items.title: Review Input Validation for User-Submitted Data
checklist_items.description: Inspect the input validation mechanisms for user-submitted data to ensure prevention of injection attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is vulnerable to SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks due to insufficient input validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation and sanitization.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review of input validation routines and penetration testing results.

checklist_items.title: Assess Session Management Security
checklist_items.description: Review the session management mechanisms to ensure that sessions are properly handled to prevent hijacking and other attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system's session management is vulnerable to attacks, leading to unauthorized access.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure session management practices such as using HTTPS, secure cookies, and regular session timeouts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of session management code and security documentation.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure coding practices for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Review code for RFRV submission to ensure that it adheres to secure coding best practices, preventing common vulnerabilities such as SQL injection or cross-site scripting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Improper input validation in the RFRV submission module could allow attackers to inject malicious code or data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation and sanitization mechanisms to prevent injection attacks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Secure coding review report, signed off by security team.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust logging for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Ensure comprehensive logs are maintained for all RFRV submissions, including timestamps, user details, and submitted data.  Logs must be securely stored and readily accessible for auditing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of detailed logs makes it difficult to detect and investigate malicious RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement comprehensive logging and auditing capabilities for the RFRV submission module.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Log configuration documentation and sample log entries.

checklist_items.title: Regularly audit RFRV submission process for vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Perform periodic security audits of the RFRV submission process to identify any vulnerabilities or weaknesses that could be exploited by malicious actors.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Regular audits are necessary to detect and mitigate emerging threats and vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct periodic security assessments of the RFRV submission process using penetration testing or other appropriate methods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports detailing security assessment findings and remediation actions.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure coding practices for all components handling RFRVs
checklist_items.description: Review code for common vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, etc.) in all modules that process RFRV data.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Improper input validation could allow attackers to inject malicious code into the RFRV process.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure coding practices including input validation and sanitization must be applied throughout the system.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports and penetration testing results.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust logging for RFRV submission and processing
checklist_items.description: Ensure detailed logs capture all steps of RFRV submission, validation, and processing, including user identity, timestamps, and any errors.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of sufficient logging hinders investigation of potential attacks and compromises.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Comprehensive logging allows for auditing and detection of malicious activities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Log files demonstrating complete audit trail.

checklist_items.title: Regularly scan for vulnerabilities in the RFRV handling components
checklist_items.description: Conduct automated vulnerability scans and penetration testing to identify and remediate security flaws.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Security flaws in the RFRV process may not be readily apparent through manual code reviews.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular automated scans and penetration testing can help identify and address potential security issues.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Vulnerability scan reports and penetration testing results.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure storage of API keys
checklist_items.description: Check that API keys for accessing external services are stored securely (e.g., encrypted at rest and in transit, managed with a secrets manager).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: API keys are stored insecurely and could be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a secure secrets management solution and encrypt API keys at rest and in transit.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of the secrets management solution and encryption implementation.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for all user inputs
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user inputs are validated to prevent injection attacks (e.g., SQL injection, cross-site scripting).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User inputs are not validated, making the system vulnerable to injection attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation for all user inputs, using parameterized queries and escaping special characters.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating the implementation of input validation.

checklist_items.title: Regularly update and patch the system
checklist_items.description: Check that the system is up-to-date with the latest security patches and updates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system is vulnerable to known vulnerabilities due to outdated software.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement automated patching and updates, and regularly check for new security vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Log files showing regular updates and patching.

checklist_items.title: Verify secure storage of API keys
checklist_items.description: Check that API keys used by the forum are stored securely using a secrets management system.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: API keys are not currently stored securely, leading to potential unauthorized access.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use a secrets management system to store API keys securely.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of the secrets management system and confirmation of API keys being stored using it.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for all user inputs
checklist_items.description: Check that all user inputs submitted to the forum are validated to prevent injection attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The forum is vulnerable to injection attacks due to lack of input validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation for all user inputs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating implementation of input validation measures.

checklist_items.title: Regularly review and update access control lists
checklist_items.description: Check that the access control lists for forum resources are reviewed and updated at least every 3 months.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Access control lists for forum resources might become outdated leading to unauthorized access.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish a policy for regular review and updating of access control lists.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit trail showing regular reviews and updates of ACLs.

checklist_items.title: Verify wallet-based login for RFRV submitters
checklist_items.description: Check that the Governance Forum requires wallet-based login for users submitting RFRVs to ensure only authenticated users can submit proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing wallet-based login requirement for RFRV submissions.

checklist_items.title: Implement input validation for RFRVs
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all fields in the RFRV submission form are validated to prevent injection attacks and ensure data integrity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission process is vulnerable to injection attacks due to insufficient input validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation mechanisms to sanitize all user inputs before processing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and testing results demonstrating secure input validation for all RFRV fields.

checklist_items.title: Regularly audit access controls for RFRV submission
checklist_items.description: Periodically review and audit the access control lists (ACLs) governing RFRV submission to ensure only authorized users can submit proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unauthorized users might gain access to submit RFRVs, leading to governance compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regularly audit and update access control lists.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs and documentation of access control reviews.
